research_scope.mechanism_family: scheduled public macro and expiration events

us46_reference_only.reason: US46 is a fixed-weight QQQ/GLD allocation. This atlas studies preregistered scheduled-event windows and cannot reopen or reinterpret US46.

forbidden: change a window after observing an outcome
rank mechanisms on validation or holdout
treat an atlas result as a strategy candidate

splits.split_assignment: An event belongs to the split containing its official event timestamp. Every entry and exit endpoint must also lie inside that split or the event is excluded and counted.

time_and_bar_contract.rth: 09:30 through 16:00 using an accepted NYSE session calendar
time_and_bar_contract.early_close_and_unscheduled_close: Only an independently accepted official NYSE calendar may define actual opens, closes, early closes and closures.
time_and_bar_contract.event_time: Use the official actual public release, embargo or statement timestamp for each event, not a scheduled date default or a modern-time backfill.

account_and_costs.nonfinite_nonpositive_or_unaffordable: exclude, count and fail the input gate if the minimum sample contract is no longer met

mechanisms.name: FOMC_PRE_ANNOUNCEMENT_DRIFT
mechanisms.event_source: Federal Reserve historical FOMC materials and statement timestamps
mechanisms.entry: 14:00 bar open on the immediately preceding complete NYSE session
mechanisms.exit: 14:00 bar open on the scheduled statement day
mechanisms.inclusion: Structurally applicable events are scheduled FOMC decisions with an official same-day public statement time strictly after 14:00 and official calendar sessions that include 14:00 on both dates. Exact minute-bar presence is not an inclusion criterion and is checked only after the denominator is frozen. A statement released exactly at 14:00 is structurally inapplicable to M1 because the 14:00 bar open is not guaranteed to precede release. The announcement-day 14:00 bar is excluded.

mechanisms.name: FOMC_ANNOUNCEMENT_TO_CLOSE_REACTION
mechanisms.event_source: Federal Reserve historical FOMC materials and statement timestamps
mechanisms.entry: bar open at the official statement timestamp
mechanisms.exit: close of the final RTH minute bar on the statement day
mechanisms.inclusion: Structurally applicable events are scheduled FOMC decisions whose official statement occurs during RTH no later than the official session close. Exact entry-bar and close presence is not an inclusion criterion and is checked only after the denominator is frozen. If release is at 14:00, the 14:00 bar is included; a 14:15 release starts at 14:15.

mechanisms.name: FOMC_CLOSE_TO_NEXT_CLOSE_REACTION
mechanisms.event_source: Federal Reserve historical FOMC materials and statement timestamps
mechanisms.entry: actual RTH close on the statement day
mechanisms.exit: actual RTH close of the next complete NYSE session
mechanisms.inclusion: Structurally applicable events are scheduled FOMC decisions released no later than the official statement-day close and followed by a complete official NYSE session. Exact price endpoints are not an inclusion criterion and are checked only after the denominator is frozen.

mechanisms.name: CPI_PRE_RELEASE_NEGATIVE_CONTROL
mechanisms.event_source: BLS CPI release archive with actual release date and time
mechanisms.entry: actual RTH close of the second NYSE session before the release date
mechanisms.exit: actual RTH close of the immediately preceding NYSE session
mechanisms.inclusion: Final actual CPI releases only. Rescheduled releases use their final actual release identity. The release itself is not in the window.
mechanisms.interpretation: event-specificity negative control, still counted in the frozen eight-test family

mechanisms.name: NFP_PRE_RELEASE_NEGATIVE_CONTROL
mechanisms.event_source: BLS Employment Situation archive with actual release date and time
mechanisms.entry: actual RTH close of the second NYSE session before the release date
mechanisms.exit: actual RTH close of the immediately preceding NYSE session
mechanisms.inclusion: Final actual Employment Situation releases only. Rescheduled releases use their final actual release identity. The release itself is not in the window.
mechanisms.interpretation: event-specificity negative control, still counted in the frozen eight-test family

mechanisms.name: MONTHLY_OPTIONS_EXPIRATION
mechanisms.event_source: accepted official standard monthly options expiration identity
mechanisms.entry: actual RTH close of the immediately preceding NYSE session
mechanisms.exit: actual RTH close on expiration day
mechanisms.inclusion: Standard monthly expirations outside March, June, September and December. If the ordinary Friday is a market holiday, only an officially identified preceding-session expiration is accepted.

mechanisms.name: QUARTERLY_OPTIONS_FUTURES_EXPIRATION
mechanisms.event_source: accepted official quarterly options and equity-index futures expiration identity
mechanisms.entry: actual RTH close of the immediately preceding NYSE session
mechanisms.exit: actual RTH close on expiration day
mechanisms.inclusion: Standard March, June, September and December quarterly expirations only. M6 and M7 are mutually exclusive by construction.

mechanisms.name: TREASURY_REFUNDING_TLT_REACTION
mechanisms.event_source: US Treasury quarterly refunding archive with actual public release timestamp
mechanisms.entry: extended-hours bar open at the official quarterly refunding announcement timestamp
mechanisms.exit: close of the 60th complete one-minute bar after entry, namely the close at event time plus 60 minutes
mechanisms.inclusion: Structurally applicable events are official quarterly refunding announcements on or after the TLT inception date 2002-07-22 whose event time through event time plus 60 minutes lies inside the independently accepted extended-session schedule. Minute-bar presence is not an inclusion criterion and is checked only after the denominator is frozen. Pre-inception events are structural not-applicable observations and are not missing data.
mechanisms.prior_strength: weak development-only prior; no claim that Treasury source evidence itself establishes positive TLT returns

sample_qualification.structural_event_denominator: For each mechanism, first enumerate all official events meeting only its frozen event type, actual official timestamp, development date, official calendar-session, asset-inception and M6/M7 month rules. Minute-bar presence, OHLCV validity and exact endpoint presence are forbidden from deciding this denominator. TLT pre-inception events are excluded before forming M8's denominator.
sample_qualification.complete_event_numerator: After the structural denominator is immutable, count events having every exact required minute endpoint with finite strictly positive prices and the required session labels. Every denominator event not in the numerator retains one aggregate missing or invalid reason.
sample_qualification.completeness_denominator: The immutable structural-event denominator defined above; never the subset remaining after price or endpoint checks.
sample_qualification.missing_endpoint_rule: Record an aggregate missing reason without issuer or event values. Do not approximate or continue if any mechanism fails a minimum.
sample_qualification.batch_stop: Any failed mechanism qualification returns INPUT_BLOCKED_INTRADAY_DATA for the entire eight-mechanism batch before any development return is opened.

overlap_and_inference.overlapping_different_mechanisms: Keep as distinct preregistered hypotheses; do not merge, choose or reassign events. This atlas does not construct a concurrent portfolio.
overlap_and_inference.primary_statistic: arithmetic mean of 15 bps round-trip net event returns
overlap_and_inference.alternative: mean > 0 for each M1 through M8

bootstrap.method: mechanism-specific circular moving block bootstrap over chronologically ordered applicable development calendar years
bootstrap.rng_streams: For mechanism ordinal i in 1 through 8, initialize PCG64 from NumPy SeedSequence([20260719, i]).
bootstrap.sampling: For each mechanism separately, form the chronological list of development calendar years containing at least one complete event after the batch passes its input gates. The list must contain at least six years. Draw two-year circular-block starts uniformly with replacement, concatenate until that mechanism's applicable-year-list length is filled, then truncate. Include every complete event return from each sampled year occurrence. Because each eligible year contains at least one complete event, every replication is nonempty; any empty replication is an implementation failure and blocks outcomes rather than being dropped or redrawn.
bootstrap.cross_mechanism_dependence: No joint or portfolio statistic is estimated. Holm family-wise error control remains valid under arbitrary dependence, so M8's post-inception bootstrap is not forced onto the 1994-2001 years and no zero-observation replicate is possible by construction.
bootstrap.lower_bound: linearly interpolated fifth percentile of bootstrap sample means

multiplicity.tie_break: M1 then M2 then M3 then M4 then M5 then M6 then M7 then M8
multiplicity.promotion_limit: At most two mechanisms may be proposed for a separately reviewed validation phase; this definition does not authorize that proposal or validation access.

diagnostics_only: event count, year count and missing-reason counts

input_identity_required_before_execution.official_event_table: event ID, type, official actual timestamp, timezone, source URL, retrieved_at, immutable source bytes hash, revision/cancellation identity and qualification status
input_identity_required_before_execution.minute_snapshot: SPY and TLT exact one-minute rows with timezone, RTH or extended-hours flag, OHLCV, source, retrieved_at, immutable snapshot and row hashes
input_identity_required_before_execution.calendar: accepted official NYSE session opens, closes, early closes and unscheduled closures over the development interval
input_identity_required_before_execution.joint_manifest: exact row counts, date coverage, duplicate/missing/nonfinite counts and hashes binding event, minute and calendar inputs

stop_rule: External review must accept this frozen definition and a complete input qualification before implementation or outcomes. If inputs remain incomplete, preserve INPUT_BLOCKED_INTRADAY_DATA; do not use daily bars, change mechanisms or open sealed periods.
